HGSS.575.0000:
The Colosseum upstairs is for
link battles.\f
Battle records, such as how many times
you had link battles and the results,\r
are recorded on the back of your\r
Trainer Card.
HGSS.575.0001: Oh, you are a Team Rocket member...
HGSS.575.0002:
I wonder how many kinds of Pokémon
there are in the world.\f
A long time ago, Professor Oak said
there were 150 different kinds...\f
Since then, many new Pokémon have
been discovered in different regions.\f
There are almost 500 different kinds
known now...
HGSS.575.0004:
A higher level Pokémon doesn’t
always win.\f
After all, it may have a type
disadvantage.\f
I don’t think there is a single
Pokémon that is the toughest.
HGSS.575.0005:
I think I’ve met you before...\f
You must have a reason for
looking like that...?
HGSS.575.0006:
Hey, I don’t mind restoring a Pokémon’s
health, even when they belong to\r
Team Rocket...\f
But stay away from other places, OK?
